title: Sun Pharmaceutical is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Sun Pharmaceutical is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Sun Pharmaceutical has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Bhubaneswar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Sun Pharmaceutical:
Sun Pharmaceutical is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sun Pharmaceutical!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
